questions.prompt: A former MSP technician must lose Exclaimer access, while the customer's mail signatures keep working. Which action matches the problem?
choices: Remove the technician from subscription User Management
Remove the technician as a signature sender
questions.explanation: Subscription User Management controls who can sign in to the Exclaimer portal. Sender Management controls whose mail receives signatures. Those are separate surfaces.

questions.prompt: Put the permanent Microsoft 365 server-side Exclaimer exit steps in order.
items: Export audit and current mail-flow evidence
Stop or remove the transport rule in a controlled change window
Remove connectors and Microsoft 365 uninstall artefacts as required
Send real internal and external test mail
Cancel or hand over the subscription
questions.explanation: You need evidence before removal and real mail tests before billing closure. Cancellation does not prove mail stopped routing through Exclaimer.
